# Things I need*Created: Thursday, May 25, 2023 at 1:38:46?PM*<div><h1>Thing</h1><h1>s I need </h1><h1><br></h1></div>

<div><br></div>
<div>Thank you JJ for asking me to partner up with you and run mock interviews with the great current students from Independence High School in San Jose. It has been a great opportunity to share my knowledge and experiences and to<br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/heic;base64,"/><br></div>
<div> learn and assist on our future leaders in Silicon Valley. <br></div>
